person.name: Katherine de Everingham
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Father Sir Adam de Everingham, 2nd Lord Everingham b. c 1307, d. 8 Feb 1388

Mother Joan d' Eiville b. b 9 Jul 1324, d. c 1378

Katherine de Everingham was born at of Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England. She married Sir John Beaumont, 4th Lord Beaumont, Admiral of the North, Constable of Dover Castle, Warden of the Cinque Ports, Ambassador to France, son of Sir Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Lord Beaumont and Margaret de Vere, circa 1379; They had 4 sons (Sir Henry, 5th Lord Beaumont; John; Sir Thomas; & Richard) and 4 daughters (Joan; Elizabeth, wife of Sir William Botreaux; Eleanor, a nun at Amesbury; & Margaret, a nun at Dartford). Katherine de Everingham died circa 1 February 1427.

«b»Family«/b»
Sir John Beaumont, 4th Lord Beaumont, Admiral of the North, Constable of Dover Castle, Warden of the Cinque Ports, Ambassador to France b. 1361, d. 9 Sep 1396

«b»Children:«/b»
1.) Sir Henry Beaumont, 5th Lord Beaumont, b. 11 May 1380, d. 15 Jun 1413

2.) Elizabeth Beaumont, b. c 1389, d. bt 1426 - 1458

3.) Sir Thomas Beaumont, Lord Basquerville, b. c 1389, d. 1475

«b»Research Notes
Father«/b»
Some sources say that Thomas Everingham was Katherine's father, including Kimber's 1781 Baronetage. Douglas Richardson describes her as "alleged daughter" of Adam de Everingham in his entry for John Beaumont, indicating uncertainty, and brings out in his notes that sources disagree as to whether Adam or Thomas was Katherine's father.

Further research is needed to see if anything firmer can be said about Katherine de Everingham's father. If so, amendments will be needed to the profiles of Adam and Thomas, and to that of Katherine's husband John Beaumont.

sourceList.title: Katherine White, "British Newspaper Archive, Family Notices"
Catherine Crompton in entry for Catherine Crompton, "England, Manchester, Parish Registers, 1603-1910"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Everingham於1367年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾拉可頓時，她的父親Thomas de  Everingham32歲，母親Agatha Everingham29歲。她和Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1427年2月1日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Everingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name from Everingham (East Yorkshire), named in Old English Yferingaham ‘homestead (hām) of the people (-inga-) of Eofor’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Everingham was born in 1367, in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas de  Everingham, was 32 and her mother, Agatha Everingham, was 29. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter. She died on 1 February 1427, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine d’Everingham est née en 1367, à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de  Everingham, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agatha Everingham, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter. Elle est décédée le 1 février 1427, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Everingham 1367 in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de  Everingham 32 und ihre Mutter Agatha Everingham 29. Sie hatte mit Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Februar 1427 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter. Morì il 1 febbraio 1427, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Everingham(이)가 1367년 영국 노틴그함실르 라스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de  Everingham(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha Everingham(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 2월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Everingham родилась в 1367 г. в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de  Everingham было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agatha Everingham, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter. Она умерла 1 февраля 1427 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
